name: Relief of Tax Liability via Bonded Transfers

eligibility.description: Requires a transfer in bond under section 5212 between independent parties with no mutual proprietary interest.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Distillers and proprietors are relieved of tax liability when spirits are transferred in bond to an independent proprietor, provided they divest all interest in the spirits.
